name: Coconut Macaroons #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a cookie sheet.
3. In a bowl, mix together the flour, shredded coconut, chopped cashews, and salt.
4. Pour in the sweetened condensed milk and vanilla extract.
5. Stir well until combined.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto the prepared cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until light golden brown.
8. Let cool completely.
